analyticsNotes.winRate: Requires match win/loss records (not in current Excel). Add columns: matches played, wins, losses.
analyticsNotes.lossRate: Same as winRate — slam counts alone do not capture losses.
analyticsNotes.whiteSlamShare: Share of a player's slams that were white slams (available now).
analyticsNotes.combinedSlamCount: Best available slam total across totalSlams, circuitSlams, or eventLog sources.
